scripts.build: bash scripts/download-node.sh && bash scripts/bundle-runtime.sh && bash scripts/build-tauri.sh
scripts.build:adhoc: bash scripts/download-node.sh && bash scripts/bundle-runtime.sh && CODESYMPHONY_ALLOW_ADHOC_SIGNING=1 bash scripts/build-tauri.sh
scripts.build:app: bash scripts/download-node.sh && bash scripts/bundle-runtime.sh && bash scripts/build-tauri.sh -b app
scripts.build:app:adhoc: bash scripts/download-node.sh && bash scripts/bundle-runtime.sh && CODESYMPHONY_ALLOW_ADHOC_SIGNING=1 bash scripts/build-tauri.sh -b app
